title: Kirb Thanks You [YTPMV Collab Entry]
description:
Kirby thanks you or something idk I didn't watch the movie. Everyone else in the collab did amazing and I'm honestly flattered to have been a part of it, if you haven't seen the full collab yet Please watch the full thing: https://youtu.be/zlw8jVQmi6M

A couple tracks are missing visuals because I hate Citra
